name: python3-browser-cookie3
title: python3-browser-cookie3
summary: loading cookies used by web browser into cookiejar object (Python)
description:
loading cookies used by web browser into cookiejar object (Python)
The browser_cookie3 Python module loads cookies used by your web browser into
a cookiejar object. This is useful in order to download with Python the same
content one sees in the web browser without needing to login.

arguments.description: Option present in package usage line for browser-cookie.
arguments.raw: -cookie  Option present in package usage line for browser-cookie.

When you need a concrete invocation, run `browser-cookie [options] [args]` as documented upstream for browser-cookie.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair browser-cookie with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `browser-cookie --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
